name: three
description: Add @faraday-academy/three — R3F 3D blocks, procedural helpers (Body/Planet/OrbitPath/Label3D), a glTF <Model> loader, and a mood-per-scene system — to an existing lesson. Pass --physics for Rapier gravity/collision.

skill.loadWhen: the lesson needs a 3D scene, an orbital/spatial model, or a 3D curriculum world
